known_issues: Slow upload when creating a paste
Upload progress bar appears delayed after initial button loading state

existing_features.title: Remove the redundant word “left” from the paste expiration UI so the expiry message reads naturally (e.g., “Expires in 9 min”, not “Expires in 9 min left”).

Improve the paste creation UX so upload/progress feedback appears immediately when the user clicks “Create Paste”, without an initial period where only the button is loading and the progress UI appears later.
Investigate and improve slow upload performance for file pastes, focusing on reducing time-to-first-progress and overall upload time where possible, without changing the 50MB per-file limit behavior.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update expiration UI copy: remove the redundant 'left' wording since 'expire' already conveys it
Improve paste creation/upload UX: show upload progress immediately and make the loading flow feel more professional
Investigate and improve slow upload performance when creating a paste

projectName: Polish expiration wording and make paste upload progress immediate and more professional
